content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Catamaran Research: Platform Engineer Anywhere in the World DevOps and Sysadmin Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5168/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://catamaran-research.ai/">https://catamaran-research.ai/</a> </p> <h3><strong>About Us</strong></h3><p>We are building the cloud compute layer for the agent age: think AWS or GCP, but designed around AI agents as first-class cloud users. Existing cloud primitives were designed for humans clicking consoles or writing static IaC, not for autonomous software that needs to spin up environments, run untrusted code, and manage its own resources at runtime.</p><p>We are venture-backed and led by three technical co-founders with backgrounds in high-frequency trading, ML engineering, and quantitative research.</p><h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3><p>This is a foundational, greenfield project. You will design and build the platform infrastructure from scratch, collaborating directly with the founding team.</p><p>You will build the infrastructure that other infrastructure runs on: the multi-cloud substrate, compute fleet management, networking, and the tooling that lets the team ship safely. The workloads are bursty, ephemeral, and untrusted, with millisecond-latency requirements and hard isolation between tenants. You will work with physical infrastructure and GPUs, not just managed cloud services.</p><p>The goal is production that is boring in the useful sense: deployable, diagnosable, recoverable.</p><h3><strong>What You'll Own</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Multi-cloud platform infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure): networking, IAM, DNS/TLS, and compute fleets.</p></li><li><p>Physical infrastructure and GPU provisioning.</p></li><li><p>IaC (Terraform/Pulumi), CI/CD pipelines, rollback workflows, and release processes.</p></li><li><p>Observability: metrics, logs, traces, alerts, and dashboards.</p></li><li><p>SLOs, incident response, on-call rotation, postmortems, and runbooks.</p></li><li><p>Capacity planning, cost modelling, and cloud spend optimization.</p></li></ul><h3><strong>You Are A Fit If</strong></h3><ul><li><p>You can write code, not just glue scripts. You build tools and automation that other engineers depend on.</p></li><li><p>You have worked across multiple cloud providers and understand their networking, IAM, and compute differences.</p></li><li><p>You can debug cloud networking, DNS/TLS, IAM, and host-level failures without a separate ops team.</p></li><li><p>You have experience with physical infrastructure, bare-metal, or GPU environments, not just managed cloud services.</p></li><li><p>You care about reliability as a product feature, not just infrastructure hygiene.</p></li><li><p>You communicate clearly and keep the team informed. When something breaks, people hear it from you first.</p></li><li><p>You stay constructive when requirements change. Uncertainty doesn't block you.</p></li><li><p>You think about the business, not just the code. You spot opportunities, seek out the actual workflow, and prototype solutions within constraints.</p></li><li><p>You're excited to work closely with founders and shape a product from the ground up.</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Useful Experience</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Building platform tooling or internal developer platforms.</p></li><li><p>Bare-metal provisioning, GPU fleet management, or physical infrastructure at scale.</p></li><li><p>Infrastructure for multi-tenant isolation workloads (VMs, containers, or sandboxes).</p></li><li><p>Low-latency or high-throughput infrastructure where milliseconds matter.</p></li><li><p>Cost modelling and unit-economics visibility for cloud compute.</p></li><li><p>Cross-cloud networking: VPCs, load balancers, DNS, CDN, and connectivity between providers.</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Compensation And Logistics</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Competitive salary and early-stage equity.</p></li><li><p>Singapore preferred; fully remote with meaningful Singapore-time overlap.</p></li><li><p>Full-time</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Contact</strong></h3><p>If this excites you, we'd love to hear from you at&nbsp;<a href="http://mailto:careers@catamaran-research.ai">careers@catamaran-research.ai</a></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/catamaran-research-platform-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/catamaran-research-platform-engineer</a></p> Wed, 13 May 2026 13:17:13 +0000 Fri, 12 Jun 2026 13:17:13 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/catamaran-research-platform-engineer https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/catamaran-research-platform-engineer Creative Force: Sales Jedi Anywhere in the World Naxxar Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/5226/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Creative Force <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.creativeforce.team/">https://www.creativeforce.team/</a> </p> <h3><strong>Great salary | Profit share | 100% remote | </strong><strong>Work from anywhere in EMEA | SaaS</strong></h3> <p>Awesome opportunity for a self-motivated and energetic people person to join our remote team and help sell our world-leading SaaS products, from anywhere within the EMEA region (Europe, Middle East or Africa).</p> <p>We pay a great salary, based on experience and location. We don't pay commissions, because good sales are a team effort—from engineering, to operations, marketing, and support, our high-performing team all contribute to a great product and service that our clients love. Everybody in the company is rewarded with a share of profit each December—we succeed together.</p> <p>Our much-loved products are in demand and are proven to make a difference to our clients' lives. You'll be selling world-leading software through a well-considered process that leaves room for personal flair.</p> <p>SaaS experience is extremely beneficial but strong communication skills, patience, curiosity, keenness to learn and friendliness are key to success in this role.</p> <h2>Join our Rebel Alliance</h2> <p>Creative Force is experiencing strong growth and as we scale our efforts in 2026 and beyond, we're looking for enthusiastic individuals to join our diverse team of Jedis to help recruit new clients as they navigate the decision process, and transform them into long-term supporters.</p> <p>You'll be a respected member of our remote global sales team and will be well supp
